acceptance_criteria.criterion: generate-plan.sh produces valid plan.json from definition.yaml
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Script implements topological sort (Kahn's algorithm), wave assignment, jq pipeline, atomic write with validation

acceptance_criteria.criterion: correction-limit.sh blocks after N consecutive failures per deliverable
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Hook reads stdin JSON, discovers active work unit, reads correction_limit from harness.yaml (default 3), matches files to deliverables. Correction increment scoped to in_progress deliverables via jq filter

acceptance_criteria.criterion: check-wave-conflicts.sh wired into step-transition at implement->review
acceptance_criteria.evidence: step-transition.sh lines 110-116: calls check-wave-conflicts.sh at implement->review boundary with non-blocking warning on failure

dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.evidence: generate-plan.sh: correct topological sort, wave assignment, validation pipeline. correction-limit.sh: correct discovery, matching, enforcement. check-wave-conflicts.sh correctly wired as non-blocking

dimensions.name: error-handling
dimensions.evidence: generate-plan.sh: 4 exit codes, dependency checks, temp file cleanup with trap. correction-limit.sh: graceful degradation (exits 0 on any error). evaluate-gate.sh now validates verdict enum

dimensions.name: security
dimensions.evidence: No secrets. Variables quoted. correction-limit.sh only reads stdin/files, no file writes

dimensions.name: maintainability
dimensions.evidence: generate-plan.sh: clear documentation header, inline Python well-contained. correction-limit.sh: linear pipeline structure, actionable error message
